style_prompt: Speaking quickly and loudly, her high-pitched tone enhances the energy.

content: Jason caught the fleece from the tree, and hurried through the grove, the deep shadows of which were illuminated as he passed by the golden glory of the precious object that he bore along.
style_prompt: In her normal tone, she spoke rapidly.

content: "Throw it among them quickly!" cried she.
style_prompt: A girl with swift speech and a high pitch captivates her listeners.
